clientName: 香港伯特利教會慈光堂 Hong Kong Tsz Kwong Bethel Church
title: 數碼形象與直播視覺升級 Digital Presence & Livestream

background.zh: 教會需要全面升級數碼形象與線上聚會體驗。
background.en: The church required a comprehensive upgrade to its digital presence and online worship experience.

solution.zh: 提供一站式多媒體支援。創作敘事影片、設計跨平台直播視覺，並建置全新官方網站，大幅提升線上參與度。
solution.en: Delivered an end-to-end multimedia solution. We produced narrative videos, designed livestream visual assets, and developed a new website to enhance engagement.

videoEmbed: [Insert Video Embed URL or leave empty]

clientName: 西北祈禱院 North West House of Prayer
title: 聲音導賞與敘事設計 Audio Guide & Narrative Design

background.zh: 西北祈禱院本身具備良好內容，但由於人手問題，未能讓參觀者有一致及多語言的講解和體驗，影響了觀眾的觀賞體驗。
background.en: Although the prayer house has excellent content, staffing constraints prevented consistent, multilingual guided experiences, affecting the overall visitor experience.

solution.zh: 優化西北祈禱院本身的內容，透過人工智能及音效製作，設計並製作英普雙語聲音導賞音軌，確保觀眾的觀賞體驗。
solution.en: Optimized the existing content using AI and audio engineering to design and produce a bilingual (English and Mandarin) audio guide, ensuring a high-quality visitor experience.

clientName: 國度禾場事工有限公司 Kingdom Harvest Ministries Ltd.
title: 聖地遊禱系列 Holy Land Tour & Prayer Series

background.zh: 頻道需要高質素的旅遊祈禱特輯，以吸引並啟發觀眾。
background.en: The channel needed high-quality travel and prayer specials to engage and inspire its audience.

solution.zh: 全盤操刀《聖地遊禱系列》製作。透過細膩的畫面調色與流暢的剪接敘事，帶領觀眾身歷其境。
solution.en: Spearheaded the production of the "Holy Land Tour & Prayer Series." Through meticulous color grading and fluid storytelling, we created an immersive viewing experience.

title: 品牌視覺與活動支援 Brand Visual & Event Support

background.zh: 越野跑品牌需要全方位的視覺建立、周邊產品開發及社群活動支援。
background.en: A trail running brand required comprehensive support for visual identity, merchandise development, and community events.

solution.zh: 從設計及製作專屬跑衣，到策劃系列節目與統籌活動直播，全面強化其專業形象。
solution.en: Designed custom running apparel, produced strategic content series, and managed high-quality event livestreams to strengthen professional identity.
